# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: DSA Practice Boost: AI-assisted problem solving on CodeGrind
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI-assisted problem solving to accelerate DSA practice with Azure OpenAI integration and real-time editor feedback.
- Slug: codegrind-dsai-assisted-practice-boost
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsai-assisted-practice-boost
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-05-26-codegrind-dsai-assisted-practice-boost.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: Demonstrate how CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with AI guidance, real-time execution, and Google authentication to streamline practice, track progress, and boost coding confidence.
- CTA: Try a sample AI-assisted challenge now and compare AI guidance vs. solo solving in CodeGrind.
- Visual brief: A short 30-45 second screen-capture video: 1) user opens CodeGrind, 2) selects a LeetCode-style problem, 3) AI assistant panel appears with suggested approaches, 4) code editor runs with Azure Judge0, 5) dashboard showing progress streak and score. Overlay captions highlight AI guidance, real-time feedback, and secure sign-in.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
